questions.q: A widely circulated May 2026 article discussed the unique challenges 19th-century missionaries faced when translating the Bible into Cherokee. Which grammatical feature did the Cherokee language notably lack when translators attempted to describe God?

In May 2026, which former NBA center and the league's first openly gay active player passed away at the age of 47?
Why was golfer Rory McIlroy forced to cut his practice round short at Aronimink Golf Club ahead of the 2026 PGA Championship?
Which defenseman scored the overtime winner for the Colorado Avalanche in Game 5 to complete a comeback and eliminate the Minnesota Wild from the 2026 NHL playoffs?
Which 45-year-old tennis legend announced they would partner with Hailey Baptiste to play in the 2026 French Open doubles?

According to industry news from May 13, 2026, government authorities charged three individuals connected to PageTurner Press and Media for running a massive publishing scam. Approximately how much money did they defraud from authors?
News broke in mid-May 2026 that Japanese composer Yuji Ohno had passed away at 84. He was best known for creating the jazz theme for which iconic anime?
During its May 2026 Upfronts presentation, Netflix announced that it is developing a third film for which Adam Sandler comedy franchise?
In a financial update heavily discussed on May 14, 2026, Capcom revealed that what staggering percentage of its total game sales are now digital?
